text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
...And those are all the events and positions for the Spring Fan Fest.
Have a look at the details and apply for your top choices by the
deadline!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go for an event that'll get me tons of new fans! How about
you? Are you gonna enter that "race from hell" everyone's talking
about?

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
No way! I'm more interested in applying for the Cheer Squad. But
then I wouldn't be able to compete in the events... Hm...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Cheer Squad, eh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I know what I must do. The Fan Fest is a day to behave as my
fans would want me to.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It will be the perfect stage for me to give a grand performance and
prove my first-rate qualities!

text_block_list.name: Bob-Hair Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I'm going to make use of my intellect and enter the quiz run!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's a good choice! You're taking the opportunity to show off
your speed and your smarts!

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I-I was thinking of entering the marathon. I don't know if I'm much of a
marathon runner, but I want to give it a try.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! As the name suggests, the Fan Fest is like a festival, so
it's a good chance to explore something new with no pressure!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I want to make my fans super happy! Which event should I enter?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my! Hehe. Just look at the big picture and you'll get your answer.
Your fans are people who have chosen to support you over countless
other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So give them a moment that'll make them glad they chose you.
People like to follow someone with a firm dream and charisma.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah! Waaah! You're the best, King! That was so helpful!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I understand now! I'll choose an event that lets me show off my
dreams and my charisma to the max!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, which event are you going to enter?! I'd love to
hear your thought process!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I'll choose an event that allows me to express my charm to
the fullest. A challenge that'll make the audience's palms sweat as I
face up to it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Though I must say, some of the options seem a little daunting even
for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The scavenger hunt obstacle race is known as the "race from hell."
Due to its intense difficulty, participants have dwindled and so has its
audience.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhhh... "Daunting"... "Challenge"... Which means everyone will be
smitten if you can complete it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A lot of runners give up halfway, so to be able to entertain the fans
and show off your skills in this race is a real test of aptitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's not the kind of event just anyone can... Huh? Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: DAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will... push... to the maaax!

text_block_list.name: Nearby Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What? Is Kawakami seriously taking on the 4,000-meter scavenger
hunt obstacle race? The one everyone drops out of every year?

text_block_list.name: Nearby Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Even if she manages it, not many people will be there to watch. And
hardly anyone's even entering this year, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That nincompoop!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why did you choose that race?! You should've listened to what I was
going to say!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Kawakami! We had a few chocolate taiyaki left over from
dessert. There's three up for grabs, so they're doing rock, paper,
scissors for them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Really?! Let me pla... I mean, I'll pass!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? You don't want them? I thought they were your
favorite.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I'm sure! I don't have a second to spare right now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... If I overcome this challenge, I'll become a first-rate princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I too... I too...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Will become first-rate like King! So I can make my fans glad they
chose to support me!

text_block_list.name: Bob-Hair Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Kawakami's still practicing for the Fan Fest. Well... makes sense
when her event is so hard to complete.

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
She's doing all this practice late into the night. It'd be sad if no one
came to cheer for her on the big day.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...That nincompoop.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
From what I hear, she's been turning down her favorite things to
spend all her time on practice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: She's even started copying me, calling herself a first-rate princess.

text_block_list.name: Bob-Hair Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You know, King, it's tomorrow. The deadline to hand in your choices
for the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Which event are you entering?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...The Cheer Squad can't take part in the competitions. I usually
wouldn't even consider it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I am King Halo, now a member of the Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The most appropriate position for me is at the top, meaning I would
like to be the leader! To celebrate this meeting, I have made
costumes for all of you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Costumes? What? This is the first time the Cheer Squad is
meeting, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes. But I give everything my absolute best! Through my connections,
I got us a custom-made design!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This year, we have only one goal! To maximize the fun at every event,
even those that don't usually receive much attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Our cheers must be worthy of the competitors giving their all. That's
why...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I will put together the most flashy and unique plan that I possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: (Since a certain fan of mine has chosen such a difficult challenge...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
(The least I can do is cheer her on. After all, the Fan Fest is an event
for the fans, isn't it?)
